content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Hardened failed-run replay handling so an older failure callback can no longer overwrite a newer retry that reused the same `run_id`. Failure reconciliation now skips stale same-`run_id` replays when the active retry has a newer `started_at`, controller transitions use monotonic timestamps, lineage finalization rejects stale started-at mismatches, and CLI terminal sync now prefers active lineage start times while persisting a descriptive synthetic `task_id` (`cli-sync:<project_id>`) in failure details. I also updated regression coverage for the stale replay case, the lineage guard, and the CLI failure-sync expectations.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Updated `src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs` to detect and skip stale same-`run_id` failure replays before they can clobber a newer retry, and made controller transition timestamps monotonic during failure reconciliation.
2. [Completed] Hardened lineage finalization in `src/adapters/fs.rs` and documented the contract in `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` so stale same-`run_id` completions with mismatched `started_at` are rejected instead of rewriting the active attempt.
3. [Completed] Adjusted `src/cli/run.rs` so failed terminal milestone sync derives the attempt start from the active lineage row when available and persists a descriptive CLI-only failure `task_id`, then aligned the affected CLI expectations.
4. [Completed] Added regression tests covering missing-journal stale replay protection, stale same-`run_id` lineage updates after retry reopen, and the CLI failure-sync/task-id behavior while preserving the resumed-at repair path.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `cargo test failure_reconciliation -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test update_task_run_rejects_stale_same_run_id_completion_after_retry_reopen -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test sync_terminal_milestone_task_leaves_failed_runs_paused_for_resume -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test sync_terminal_milestone_task_repairs_missing_resumed_start_when_stale_failed_lineage_exists -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test` passed on the full suite.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix build` was launched and progressed into the active derivation build stage, but no final exit status was observed in-session.

## Outstanding Risks

- `nix build` was started on the updated tree and remained in the active derivation build stage with no final success/failure exit observed in-session, so the authoritative Nix gate is still unresolved.
